creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to Greg Lewis from comment #8)

Can you rephrase?! I do not really understand what you refer to by EoL of what? Java 8? Java 11? They will live on for years to come.

My current workaround is to apply:
(cd /usr/local/openjdk8/jre/lib/security; rm cacerts; ln -sf /usr/local/etc/ssl/cacerts; pkg check -r openjdk8)

cacerts contains the same combination certctl produces.
